---
title: "WQU Blog"
listing:
  contents: posts
  sort: "date desc"
  type: grid
  grid-columns: 1
  categories: false
  feed: true
  image-height: 210px
  fields:
    - image
    - title
    - description
    - date
    - categories
page-layout: full
---

::: {.blog-hero}
::: {.hero-copy}
::: {.eyebrow}
WQU Insights
:::

# Talent is global. Insight should travel.

Practical notes for WQU students: common issues, frequent questions, extra explanations, and guidance for getting unstuck in quantitative, data science, and AI coursework.
:::

::: {.hero-media}
![](assets/wqu-blog-cover.png){.hero-image fig-alt="A modern desk with analytics, notebooks, and a global map detail."}
:::
:::

::: {.section-intro}
::: {.eyebrow}
Latest Posts
:::

## Course insights, FAQs, and explanations for common student blockers.
:::
